variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 17454 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 17454 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 17454 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 230.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 207.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 200.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 45.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 28.0 mm

variants.title: Mann Filter CF 2125/1 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17454
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter CF 2125/1 Secondary Element | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17454
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filter secondary elements offer a comprehensive protection against wear / Engine is protected even if the main filter component is replaced or damaged. While the main element is being replaced, extreme or dusty operating conditions can sometimes occur - the secondary element continues to provide optimum protection for a clean air.
specifications: Style: Secondary Element, Dimension A: 208.0 mm, Dimension B: 141.0 mm, Dimension H: 45.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4194 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17454
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4194 Air Filter, Secondary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 17454
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4194 panel air filter provides optimized airflow designed with OEM requirements. Protect your investment and extend the life of your equipment with a filter that delivers superior protection.
